subject: (Live NOW) Hotline, Q&A, Countdown
body:
I'm going LIVE now for the final book donation countdown.

During the Youtube Live, I'll be doing...

- Hormozi Hotline
- Behind the Scenes
- Lost Chapters
- Q&A
- And some surprise bonuses.

Tune in now - we're live.

WATCH LIVE NOW

Also.. Cart closes at midnight tonight (PT).

So, you have less than 12 hours to grab your 200 copies of 100M Money Models PLUS the mountain of book bonuses.

You can see what they are full breakdown here: RECAP.ACQ.COM

OR if you prefer to read, I attached a letter there that explains everything.

Alex

PS - I'm taking the offer down for good in 12hrs. Grab the books and claim your insane bonuses right now.

To be clear, no purchase will ever change how grateful I am to be on this ride with you. Thank you again.
